# MangaWithAI — AI Agent for Manga Creation on Celo

## Overview
MangaWithAI is an autonomous AI agent that generates manga from text prompts, handles micropayments via stablecoins on Celo, and operates an NFT marketplace. Built for MiniPay's 15M+ users.

## Agent Identity
- ERC-8004 Registry: https://celoscan.io/token/0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432?a=9365
- Agent ID: #9365
- Chain: Celo Mainnet (42220)
- Agent Wallet: 0x792cA42F2C2f9D9fB56dDBbfE9a0916AE6e98DD8

## Capabilities
- manga-generation: Generate full manga pages from text prompts
- story-creation: Create multi-chapter stories with character consistency
- nft-minting: Mint creations as ERC-721 NFTs with ERC-2981 royalties
- marketplace: Buy/sell NFTs with multi-asset support (USDC/USDT/USDm)
- micropayments: Accept x402 payments for content generation

## Smart Contracts (Celo Sepolia - 11142220)
- MangaNFT: 0xC92AA61585e955D6B12735b5D90bca49BcfFf8FA
- MangaMarketplace: 0xD7420dD58505E5cf10Bb9e91Bf4A0B96a8d7498d

## API Endpoints
- Base URL: https://mangawithai.duckdns.org
- Agent Metadata: https://mangawithai.duckdns.org/.well-known/agent.json
- Create Story: POST /v1/stories (requires x402 payment, $0.01 USDC)
- Public Feed: GET /v1/public/feed (no auth)
- Leaderboard: GET /v1/leaderboard/creators
- Styles: GET /v1/styles

## Payment
- Protocol: x402
- Asset: USDC on Celo Sepolia
- Price: $0.01 per generation
- First generation: FREE (no payment needed)

## Tech Stack
- AI: Google Gemini (gemini-2.5-pro text, imagen-3 images)
- Blockchain: Celo L2, Solidity, ERC-721, ERC-2981, ERC-8004
- Frontend: Next.js 15, wagmi, viem
- Backend: Express, Prisma, PostgreSQL

## Links
- Live App: https://manga-with-ai-web.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/lamdanghoang/manga-with-ai
- API Docs: https://manga-with-ai-web.vercel.app/api-docs
